name: Norddampf Relict Bubbler
summary: This glass filter adds advanced water cooling to vapour sessions, resulting in smoother, cleaner, and more flavorful hits.
description: This glass filter adds advanced water cooling to vapour sessions, resulting in smoother, cleaner, and more flavorful hits. Perfect for shops seeking premium vaporiser accessories that boost customer satisfaction and increase basket size: This water filter attachment cools vapour before it reaches the mouthpiece, delivering a much smoother experience. It also removes impurities from vapour, giving users the full taste of their dry herbs without harshness or dry throat. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
